co2_analysis package¶

Submodules¶

co2_analysis.analyzer module¶

Analysis utilities for the CO2 emissions project.

class co2_analysis.analyzer.CO2Analyzer(dataframe: DataFrame)¶

Bases: object

Performs basic analysis on cleaned CO2 emissions data.

gdp_co2_correlation() → float¶

Calculate correlation between GDP and CO2 emissions.

gdp_co2_regression() → dict¶

Fit a simple linear regression model predicting CO2 from GDP.

global_emissions_by_year() → DataFrame¶

Calculate total global CO2 emissions by year.

top_emitters(year: int, n: int = 10) → DataFrame¶

Return top CO2 emitting countries for a selected year.

co2_analysis.data_loader module¶

Data loading utilities for the CO2 emissions project.

class co2_analysis.data_loader.DataLoader(filepath: str)¶

Bases: object

Loads the OWID CO2 emissions dataset.

load_data() → DataFrame¶

Load dataset from CSV file.

Returns:

pd.DataFrame: Loaded dataset.

co2_analysis.main module¶

Main pipeline for reproducing the CO2 emissions analysis.

co2_analysis.main.main() → None¶

Run the full CO2 analysis pipeline.

co2_analysis.processor module¶

Data processing utilities for the CO2 emissions project.

class co2_analysis.processor.DataProcessor(dataframe: DataFrame)¶

Bases: object

Processes and cleans CO2 emissions data.

add_region_group(dataframe: DataFrame) → DataFrame¶

Add EU / Non-EU classification.

remove_missing_values() → DataFrame¶

Remove rows with missing values.

select_columns() → DataFrame¶

Select important columns for analysis.

co2_analysis.visualizer module¶

Visualization utilities for the CO2 emissions project.

class co2_analysis.visualizer.CO2Visualizer(dataframe: DataFrame, output_dir: str = 'outputs/figures')¶

Bases: object

Creates plots for CO2 emissions analysis.

plot_global_emissions(global_data: DataFrame) → None¶

Plot global CO2 emissions over time.

plot_region_comparison(dataframe: DataFrame) → None¶

Plot average CO2 emissions for EU vs Non-EU countries over time.

plot_top_emitters(top_emitters: DataFrame, year: int) → None¶

Plot top CO2 emitting countries for a selected year.

Module contents¶

CO2 Reproducible Research Project
